title: stelis amaliae
intro: Stelis amaliae, also known as the "Horned Orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). Traditionally, Stelis amaliae has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, due to its flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Stelis amaliae is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
